calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-12-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT STEVEN KELLY'S Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Off calendar. Movant withdrew the motion on April 26, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-24-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Up Prove-Up Hearing And For Entry Of Court Judgment Against Defendants Plutos Dining Inc Dba Plutos And Steven Kelly
Off Calendar Feb-23-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Pluto's Dining Inc., dba Pluto's, and Steven Kelly.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Kaipo Youg, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bi-Rite Restaurant Supply Co., Inc., dba Bi-Rite Foodservice Distributors.
Paula Xing, Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Young and Ms. Xing appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendants Pluto's Dining Inc., dba Pluto's, or Steven Kelly.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Common Counts was filed on January 16, 2020, and personally served on Virpal Kaur, Owner of defendant Pluto's Dining Inc., dba Pluto's, on October 16, 2020.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents on defendant Steven Kelly occurred on February 18, 2020, and was effectuated on March 7, 2020.
Default as to both defendants was entered on December 15, 2020.
Dismissal without prejudice of plaintiff's complaint as to defendant David hayer, a/k/a David Dilveer Hayer, was filed with the Clerk's Office on December 15, 2020.
DOE defendants dismissed today, February 23, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bi-Rite Restaurant Supply Co., Inc., dba Bi-Rite Foodservice Distributors, and against the defaulted defendants Pluto's Dining Inc., dba Pluto's, and Steven Kelly, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48,797.85.
Prejudgment Interest - 7,830.69.
Attorney Fees - $2,635.00.
Costs - $763.00.

Total - $60,026.54.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
